name: Central Douglas County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Central Douglas County Family YMCA in Roseburg, OR! There are 6 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Reedsport Community Center
description: Reedsport Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Reedsport, OR. There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Umpqua Valley Tennis and Pickleball Center
description: 4 permanent indoor courts, but adjoining tennis court is often taped for an additional 3 courts with non-permanent courts.  Outside courts are taped on tennis courts, but a complete overhaul is being completed summer of 2025, which will add 10 permanent outdoor courts.   All courts are public, but have small fees to play.
fees: Fee required — small fees, depending on play time and indoors vs outdoors.
